seeed_rpcble_init.tooltip: Initialize Wio Terminal rpcBLE device and set broadcast name

seeed_rpcble_is_initialized.tooltip: Returns whether the BLEDevice has been initialized

seeed_rpcble_get_address.tooltip: Get the native BLE MAC address string

seeed_rpcble_set_mtu.tooltip: Set BLE maximum transmission unit MTU

seeed_rpcble_server_create_service.tooltip: Create GATT service on BLE server

seeed_rpcble_server_connected_count.tooltip: Get the number of BLE clients connected to the server

seeed_rpcble_server_set_callbacks.tooltip: Set connection and disconnection callbacks for the BLE server

seeed_rpcble_create_characteristic.tooltip: Create characteristic values in GATT services

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_permissi.tooltip: Set GATT access rights for characteristic values

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_add_notify_d.tooltip: Add BLE2902 descriptor for notification characteristics

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_add_descript.message0: Characteristics %1 Create Descriptor UUID %2 Flags %3 Permissions %4 Length %5

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_value.tooltip: Set feature value to text data

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_byte.tooltip: Set the characteristic value to 1 byte data, suitable for standard characteristics such as battery power

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_get_value.tooltip: Read the current text data of the local feature value

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_indicate.tooltip: Send an indication of a characteristic value that requires confirmation

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_callback.tooltip: Set a feature write callback and cache the most recently received text

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_received_val.tooltip: Read characteristics write the most recent text cached by the callback

seeed_rpcble_advertising_add_service_uui.tooltip: Add service UUID to BLE broadcast data

seeed_rpcble_advertising_set_scan_respon.tooltip: Set whether to enable scanning response data

seeed_rpcble_advertising_set_preferred.message0: Set broadcast preference parameters minimum %1 maximum %2
seeed_rpcble_advertising_set_preferred.tooltip: Set broadcast preferred connection parameters, often used to improve mobile phone compatibility

seeed_rpcble_start_advertising.tooltip: Start broadcasting to make the device discoverable by scanning

seeed_rpcble_scan_set_active.tooltip: Active scanning is faster but consumes more power

seeed_rpcble_scan_set_window.tooltip: Set the BLE scan window, usually less than or equal to the scan interval

seeed_rpcble_scan_start.tooltip: Start a BLE scan and save scan results

seeed_rpcble_scan_clear_results.tooltip: Clear scan results and free memory

seeed_rpcble_scan_results_count.tooltip: Get the number of scanned BLE devices

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_name.tooltip: Read the device name of the specified scan result

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_address.tooltip: Read the MAC address of the specified scan result

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_rssi.message0: RSSI of scan result %1 serial number %2
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_rssi.tooltip: Read the signal strength RSSI of the specified scan result

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_service_uuid.message0: Scan result %1 Serial number %2 Service UUID
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_service_uuid.tooltip: Read the first service UUID broadcast by the specified scan result

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_info.message0: Scan result %1 Complete information of serial number %2
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_info.tooltip: Read the complete description text of the specified scan result

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_has_service.message0: Scan result %1 Serial number %2 Contains service UUID %3
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_has_service.tooltip: Determine whether the specified scan result broadcasts the target service UUID

seeed_rpcble_client_connect.tooltip: Connect to specified BLE MAC address

seeed_rpcble_client_is_connected.tooltip: Determine whether the BLE client is connected

seeed_rpcble_client_rssi.tooltip: Read the remote RSSI of the client connection

seeed_rpcble_client_get_service.tooltip: Obtain the specified GATT service from the remote BLE server

seeed_rpcble_remote_service_get_characte.tooltip: Obtain specified characteristics from the remote GATT service

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_read.tooltip: Read remote BLE characteristic value text

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_write.tooltip: Write text data to remote BLE signature

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_can_r.tooltip: Determine whether the remote feature supports reading

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_can_w.tooltip: Determine whether the remote feature supports writing

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_can_n.tooltip: Determine whether the remote feature supports notifications

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_regis.tooltip: Subscribe to remote feature notifications and cache received data

seeed_rpcble_remote_notify_value.tooltip: Read the latest text cached by the remote notification callback

seeed_rpcble_uart_begin.tooltip: Create a Nordic UART style BLE service suitable for mobile phones or Web Bluetooth for text sending and receiving

seeed_rpcble_uart_send.tooltip: Notify text data via BLE UART TX feature

seeed_rpcble_uart_connected.tooltip: Determine whether there is a client connection to BLE UART

seeed_rpcble_uart_received.tooltip: Read BLE UART RX Characteristics Recently Received Text

seeed_rpcble_uart_on_receive.tooltip: Set the processing logic after the BLE UART receives the text

seeed_rpcble_web_battery_begin.message0: Start Web Bluetooth battery service Name %1 Initial battery %2
seeed_rpcble_web_battery_begin.tooltip: Create the standard battery service 0x180F to facilitate the Web Bluetooth sample to read and subscribe to the battery level

seeed_rpcble_web_battery_set_level.tooltip: Update battery level characteristics, optionally notifying subscribing clients immediately

seeed_rpcble_web_battery_level.tooltip: Read the current battery level cached by the battery service

seeed_rpcble_web_battery_connected.tooltip: Determine whether the battery service has a client connection

seeed_rpcble_ibeacon_begin.message0: Start iBeacon Name %1 UUID %2 Major %3 Minor %4 Vendor ID %5 Power %6 Information %7 Type %8
seeed_rpcble_ibeacon_begin.tooltip: Configure and start iBeacon broadcasts, which can include scan response names and text messages
